template_steps.completion_boundary: Complete the opening frame without collapsing the plan spine.
template_steps.step_label: Observe the parent frame before descent.

template_steps.completion_boundary: Complete only after lawful child work is reintegrated to the parent step.
template_steps.step_label: Decompose the active parent step into lawful child work.

template_steps.completion_boundary: Return to the top-level plan and emit the next lawful step.
template_steps.step_label: Rejoin the top-level plan after local descent.

template_steps.completion_boundary: List the bounded child constraints before local synthesis.
template_steps.step_label: Scan the child-step constraints for the active parent step.

template_steps.completion_boundary: Emit a bounded child result that can be reintegrated to the parent step.
template_steps.step_label: Compose the bounded local result for the active parent step.
